title: Better Toast
body:
# Better Toast

Options for those pesky notification toasts and the sounds they makes!

Removal of:
- Tutorial toasts
- Recipe unlock toasts
- Messages cant be verified.

![Removal of these toast notifications](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65b9b6ff38f16ff65b2371a3180b4d2471bc8c78.png)

Configuration:

![configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3722792cc93a36c1459018244092f16335072807.png)

Upcoming:
- Customisation of toast notifications. (Border, color, background)
